title: limonium insigne subsp. insigne
intro: Limonium insigne subsp. insigne, also known as Sea Lavender or Rosemary Sea Lavender, is a perennial succulent plant belonging to the Plumbaginaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Limonium insigne subsp. insigne include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
